description: A source-linked patient-clinician second brain that tracks unresolved health threads across time, preserves patient story, connects clinical signals, and closes follow-up loops under clinician review.
research_topic: Shared Health Memory: a medical second-brain approach for unresolved health issues

description: A living container for one unresolved or ongoing health concern, including story, timeline, baseline changes, tests, visits, open questions, follow-up obligations, owners, and source links.

description: Medical adaptation of second-brain workflows. Adds closure and correction because healthcare memory must prevent missed follow-up and repair errors.

description: The product helps patients and care teams carry context forward until the issue is resolved, explained, monitored, or safely handed off.

description: The system can flag unresolved issues, missing data, pending items, and patterns, but should not provide final diagnosis or replace clinician judgment.
